title: Users may not get email notifications for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts
impact: Users may not get email notifications for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts.

updates.content:
Title: Users may not get email notifications for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts

User impact: Users may not get email notifications for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts.

Current status: This is a continuation of PB1249121. After further analysis and testing, we've found that our previous fix didn't address all potential impact scenarios. As such, we're conducting additional internal analysis to help develop another fix to fully address the impact to email notifications not being received.
 
Scope of impact: Any user that should receive an email notification for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts may be impacted.
 
Start time: Tuesday, March 10, 2026, at 9:08 PM UTC
 
Root cause: An unexpected issue with Power BI reports and dashboards and Microsoft Fabric artifact sharing is preventing users from receiving email notifications.
 
Next update by: Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 9:00 PM UTC

Title: Users may not get email notifications for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts

User impact: Users may not get email notifications for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts.

Current status: We've completed our internal analysis of the issue impacting Microsoft Fabric artifact sharing and have developed a code fix to remediate the discrepancy. We've initiated deployment of our fix, and we anticipate the fix deployment to be completed and remediate impact by Monday, April 27, 2026. We aim to provide updates on our timeline to remediation as deployment progresses.
 
Scope of impact: Any user that should receive an email notification for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts may be impacted.
 
Start time: Tuesday, March 10, 2026, at 9:08 PM UTC
 
Root cause: An unexpected issue with Power BI reports and dashboards and Microsoft Fabric artifact sharing is preventing users from receiving email notifications.
 
Next update by: Friday, April 24, 2026, at 9:00 PM UTC

Title: Users may not get email notifications for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts

User impact: Users may not get email notifications for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts.

Current status: We're monitoring the deployment of our code fix which as it nears completion. While the deployment is taking longer than initially anticipated, we expect it will complete by our next scheduled communications update.

Scope of impact: Any user that should receive an email notification for shared Power BI reports and dashboards or Microsoft Fabric artifacts may be impacted.

Start time: Tuesday, March 10, 2026, at 9:08 PM UTC

Estimated time to resolve: We anticipate the code fix will complete deployment and remediate the impact by Monday, April 27, 2026, at 9:30 PM UTC.

Root cause: An unexpected issue with Power BI reports and dashboards and Microsoft Fabric artifact sharing is preventing users from receiving email notifications.

Next update by: Monday, April 27, 2026, at 9:30 PM UTC
